content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 8, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 8 focused on critical infrastructure for Eliza Cloud Apps, specifically resolving P0 blockers for ingress routing, database isolation, and container deployment. Significant progress was made in stabilizing the BitRouter AI gateway and ensuring runtime environment consistency for agent plugins.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Apps Ingress and Deployment Infrastructure**
*   Implemented per-app Caddy routing and deploy-flow wiring to ensure apps are reachable via `<shortid>.apps.elizacloud.ai` ([#8325](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8325)).
*   Added collision-safe host-port allocation to prevent port conflicts during container scaling ([#8328](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8328)).
*   Ensured tenant database isolation by injecting DSNs under both `DATABASE_URL` and `POSTGRES_URL` ([#8322](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8322)).
*   Resolved Terraform application errors in the apps data-plane ([#8318](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8318)).

**BitRouter Gateway and AI Pricing**
*   Isolated staging and production environments for BitRouter to prevent configuration leakage ([#8329](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8329), [#8330](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8330)).
*   Switched BitRouter to API-key mode (BYOK) to resolve 402 payment errors and forced pricing for OpenAI text-embedding models ([#8323](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8323), [#8324](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8324), [#8332](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8332)).
*   Cleaned up BitRouter YAML configuration to follow canonical schemas ([#8326](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8326)).

**Runtime and CI/CD Fixes**
*   Fixed runtime image errors by hoisting `plugin-wallet` transitive dependencies and bundling them correctly in the agent image ([#8331](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8331), [#8333](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8333)).
*   Corrected environment variable inheritance for staging workers in `wrangler.toml` ([#8327](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8327)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8341](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8341): Feat/canvas voice preference.
*   [#8340](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8340): fix: route dynamic view commands through VIEWS.
*   [#8339](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8339): feat(cloud-frontend): implement interactive canvas Voice UX & default dashboard layout preference.
*   [#8336](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8336): feat(plugin-sql): Electric Cloud sync integration with write-back service.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
**Apps Billing and Go-Live Readiness**
*   [#8342](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8342): Identified 4 billing leaks in the Apps (Product 2) hosting and per-tenant-DB billing model that require resolution before go-live.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
**[#8321](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8321) Eliza Cloud Apps: scaling + ingress gaps**
*   Development is nearing completion on the P0 requirements. The team has successfully merged ingress routing, collision-safe ports, and database isolation contracts. 
*   Remaining tasks focus on cloud-init configurations, specifically Caddy installation, pgbouncer setup, and autoscaling logic. 
*   The team is coordinating a transition to a new isolated staging project to finalize testing before enabling production deployments.
